title: Thialf
description: ***.nl zoominfo.com/c/thialf/430686423 Thialf is a world-renowned ice arena located in Heerenveen, Netherlands, often referred to as the "Cathedral of Speed Skating." It serves as the home base for the Dutch national speed skating team and hosts a wide range of ice sports, including long track and short track speed skating, figure skating, and ice hockey. Recently, it was officially confirmed as the long-track speed skating venue for the 2030 Winter Olympics. The facility is celebrated for its modern, sustainable design and its role as a major hub for both elite professional competitions and public recreational skating.
